hooks.command: echo 'Caveman mode active. Use /caveman lite|full|ultra for intensity levels.' && sleep 0.3
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs)$' && npx eslint "$f" --max-warnings 0; } 2>/dev/null || true
